title: nav has no CSS in safestyles/implementations/vanilla/components.css
description: safedesk build render confirms 6 nav buttons in DOM. render.json shows styles=vanilla. But grep finds zero [data-nav-button] or [data-nav] rules in safestyles/implementations/vanilla/components.css. Nav renders invisibly — buttons exist but have no visual styling.
fix: Add nav CSS rules to safestyles/implementations/vanilla/components.css matching the data-* attributes set by builders/nav.ts.
